description: Learn the basics of using a kitchen knife safely and effectively.

steps.step: Choose the right knife for the task.
Hold the knife properly with a firm grip.
Practice the claw grip with your non-dominant hand to keep fingers safe.
Learn basic cutting techniques: chopping, slicing, dicing.
Clean and maintain your knife after use.

safety_tips: Always cut away from your body.
Keep your knife sharp to prevent slips.
